explanation: The natural language requirement states that, when the ventilator is in Pressure Controlled Ventilation (PCV) mode, the user must be able to start a lung recruitment procedure (Recruitment Maneuver, RM) by pressing a single button. Based on the given atomic propositions, 'PCVMode' denotes the PCV mode being active, and 'RMButton' indicates the recruitment maneuver is set by the GUI (i.e., the button is pressed). The property is thus: whenever the system is in PCV mode, it must be possible that pressing the RMButton initiates the Recruitment Maneuver (i.e., 'RM' becomes true). Therefore, we capture the intent with: 'while PCVMode, whenever RMButton, immediately satisfy RM'. This ensures that while in PCV mode, every time the RM button is pressed, the recruitment maneuver can be immediately initiated (no extraneous delay or impossibility).
decision2_substring: it shall be possible to initiate with the push of a single button a lung recruitment procedure, termed Recruitment Maneuver (RM)
decision3_substring: it shall be possible to initiate with the push of a single button a lung recruitment procedure, termed Recruitment Maneuver (RM)
output_structured_natural_language: while PCVMode, whenever RMButton, immediately satisfy RM

explanation:
The requirement states that, in PCV mode, a lung recruitment procedure (RM) can be initiated by the user with a single button press. The only relevant atomic propositions are 'PCVMode', which indicates the system is in PCV mode, and 'RMButton', which indicates the Recruitment Maneuver is set by the GUI (i.e., the button is pushed). There are no propositions specifically about ensuring it happens with a single button press, nor a separate proposition that constrains 'possible' or disables/blocks functionality. Therefore, the best structured NL property is: Whenever PCVMode is true, it must be possible that activating RMButton (setting the recruitment maneuver) will initiate the RM procedure. So, the requirement essentially says: Whenever PCVMode is true, upon (pressing) RMButton, RM becomes active. This captures that pressing the single button (RMButton) in PCV mode enables RM. The structural NL translation is: 'while PCVMode, upon RMButton, immediately satisfy RM'. This is mapped as 'while bool_exp1, upon bool_exp2, immediately satisfy bool_exp3'.

- bool_exp1: PCVMode
- bool_exp2: RMButton
- bool_exp3: RM

The substrings are mapped accordingly, covering "In PCV mode", "with the push of a single button" (as modeled by RMButton), and "initiate lung recruitment procedure, termed Recruitment Maneuver (RM)".

decision3_substring: initiate with the push of a single button a lung recruitment procedure, termed Recruitment Maneuver (RM)
output_structured_natural_language: while PCVMode, upon RMButton, immediately satisfy RM
